title: Electrical Engineering
description: A hardware-focused major covering circuits, signals, electronics, control systems, and power applications.

title: Mechanical Engineering
description: Studies mechanics, materials, thermodynamics, and the design of machines, systems, and physical products.

title: Civil Engineering
description: Prepares students to design and maintain infrastructure such as roads, buildings, water systems, and bridges.

title: Computer Engineering
description: Bridges hardware and software through embedded systems, digital logic, computing architecture, and device design.

title: Industrial Engineering
description: Focuses on process optimization, systems efficiency, operations research, quality improvement, and workflow design.

title: Information Technology
description: Covers technical support, networking, systems administration, cloud tools, and practical business technology management.

title: Robotics Engineering
description: Combines mechanics, electronics, sensors, and programming to design autonomous and intelligent machines.
